title: Create: Processing
description: A create addon that adds new type processing.
body:
## Features

### Ways to Process with a Fan

*   Withering processes
*   Purifying processes
*   Sanding processes
*   Petrifying processes
*   Enderfying processes

### Pressing and Mixing

*   Hot Pressing
*   Cold Pressing
*   Magnetic Pressing
*   Speed Pressing
*   Cold Mixing
*   Resonance Mixing
*   Speed Mixing

### Ways to Process Using a Fan

![Fan processing setup](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/FUig7WGr/images/0cec10f07952bd266dd135adb5dc9f3aea5d93f8.png)

### Ways to Process Using a Press

![Press processing setup](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/FUig7WGr/images/805b07dec5b35340f6530df6f780a3b4029d086b.png)

### Ways to Process Using a Mixer

![Mixing processing setup](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/FUig7WGr/images/3c0703e7c0f0df8c3152cc7da1595bbd52cc5c0a.png)

## How it Works

This add-on is built around Create's existing machines and recipe flow.

Encased Fans can process items when paired with specific catalyst blocks or fluids.  
Pressing and Mixing recipes extend progression while staying close to Create's core gameplay loop.

JEI categories are shown only when their related processing types are enabled.  
Configuration options let server owners and pack makers enable or disable each processing family.

## Config File

The config file allows enabling or disabling processing families, so you can keep only the mechanics you want for your modpack or server setup.

## Additional Comments

The goal of this add-on is to keep the feel of Create while expanding processing options and adding new behavior to existing machines.
